# llms.txt — Madan Kumar PC | Portfolio
# https://pcmadankumar.github.io
# Last updated: 2026-04-12

## About This Site

This is the personal portfolio website of Madan Kumar PC, an educator, career counsellor,
and lifelong learner based in Tamil Nadu, India. The site is a static HTML/CSS/JS site
hosted on GitHub Pages. All content is factual and sourced from professional records.

---

## Who Is Madan Kumar PC?

Madan Kumar PC is a Cambridge Programme Coordinator, CAP Accredited Career Counsellor,
and EdTech advocate with over 15 years of professional experience spanning education
and information technology.

- Full name: Madan Kumar PC
- Location: Tamil Nadu, India
- Email: pcmadankumar@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/madankumarpc
- GitHub: https://github.com/pcmadankumar
- Linktree: https://linktr.ee/pcmadankumar

---

## Current Roles (as of 2026)

1. Cambridge Implementation Coordinator — HQ
   Organisation: The Indian Public School (Erode, Salem & Trichy Campuses)
   Since: February 2024
   Scope: Plans and executes Cambridge academic programme implementations across multiple campuses.

2. Head — Career Guidance and Placement Support
   Organisation: The Indian Public School, Erode
   Since: November 2020
   Scope: Leads the team supporting high school students in undergraduate placement and career counselling.

3. Member — TIPS Learning and Research Institute
   Organisation: The Indian Public School
   Since: March 2024
   Scope: Creates and delivers professional development modules for educators on AI, classroom management, and assessment.

---

## Professional Background

Madan Kumar PC has worked across two distinct industries:

### Education (10+ years — 2015 to present)
- The Indian Public School, Erode & Salem (10 years 4 months)
  - Cambridge Implementation Coordinator — HQ (Feb 2024–present)
  - Head, Career Guidance & Placement Support (Nov 2020–present)
  - Exam Officer & Global Perspectives Facilitator (Mar 2018–Nov 2020)
  - Computer Science Facilitator & Subject Matter Expert (Dec 2015–Mar 2018)

### Information Technology (5 years — 2011 to 2015)
- Ernst & Young Global Consulting — Senior Consultant, Team Lead (Sep 2014–Nov 2015)
- Infosys BPM — Senior Systems Engineer, Product Development (Mar 2013–Sep 2014)
- Infosys — System Engineer, Education & Research Scholar (May 2011–Mar 2013)
- Infosys — Internship Trainee (Feb 2011–May 2011)

---

## Education

- Master of Computer Applications (MCA), Computer Science
  Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham — 2007 to 2010

- Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com), E-Commerce / Electronic Commerce
  PSG College of Arts and Science — 2004 to 2007

---

## Key Certifications

- International Certified Career Coach (ICCC) — ICCC Foundation (March 2024)
- CAP Accredited Counsellor — Times Higher Education (Counsellor Accreditation Programme)
- Cambridge Certified Exam Officer — Cambridge Assessment International Education
- 30+ professional certifications across career coaching, Cambridge education, AI, and EdTech

---

## Key Skills

Education & Pedagogy: Cambridge Curriculum, Assessment Strategies, Classroom Management,
Lesson Planning, Professional Development, Global Perspectives, NEP Implementation,
Cambridge Programme Coordination, Exam Administration.

Career Guidance: Career Counselling, Student Placement Support, Academic Mentoring,
Student Profile Development, Undergraduate Pathway Guidance, CAP Accredited Counselling.

EdTech & AI: AI for Educators, EdTech Partnership Development, Digital Learning Tools,
Learning Management Systems, Adaptive Assessment Design.

Information Technology: Java, JSP, SQL, Oracle, Hibernate, Full Stack Web Development,
Cloud Infrastructure, Identity & Access Management (IAM), IT Risk Assessment.

Leadership: Team Leadership, Training Event Management, Programme Coordination,
Multi-Campus Management, Strategic Implementation, Stakeholder Communication.

Languages: Tamil (Native / Bilingual), English (Full Professional), Malayalam (Elementary).

---

## Key Achievements

- Promoted to Cambridge Exam Officer (2018) — recognised for excellence as a Computer Science facilitator
- Appointed Head of Career Guidance & Placement Support (2020) — leads undergraduate placement team
- Appointed Cambridge Implementation Coordinator — HQ (2024) — oversees multiple allied campuses
- Selected as Member, TIPS Learning and Research Institute (2024) — educator professional development
- Holds CAP Accreditation for student counselling and career guidance
- Contributor to Cambridge Collaborative Action Groups for affiliated school decisions

---

## Projects

Personal Portfolio Website — https://pcmadankumar.github.io
  A build-to-learn project; dark-themed, mobile-responsive static site deployed on GitHub Pages.
  Tech: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript.

Dhuruv 4.0 — locally hosted personal management system (Contacts, Calendar, Finance, Goals, Tasks, Notes, Dashboard).
  Tech: React, TypeScript, Node.js, SQLite, Tesseract.js, Tailwind CSS.
  Demo available on request.

Markdown Viewer (Mark) — standalone Windows desktop Markdown viewer and exporter.
  Tech: Python, PyQt6, markdown2, Pygments, python-docx, PyInstaller.
  Demo available on request.

Invoice Tracker — multi-currency invoice management app for Cambridge Exam Coordinator workflows.
  Tech: React, TypeScript, Node.js, SQLite, Tailwind CSS, Chart.js.
  Demo available on request.

Cambridge Syllabus Management Toolkit — two-script Python toolkit for Cambridge programme coordination.
  Script 1 bulk-downloads all Cambridge IGCSE and AS & A Level syllabuses (155+ subjects) from the
  Cambridge International website, organised by qualification level and subject code.
  Script 2 reads each syllabus PDF, extracts exam series availability and administrative zone data,
  and generates a colour-coded Excel report with separate sheets for IGCSE and AS & A Level.
  Tech: Python, BeautifulSoup4, requests, pdfplumber, openpyxl.
  Demo available on request.

Pragat — Evidence Portfolio — standalone Windows desktop application for professional evidence management.
  Collects, organises, and exports evidence of professional work mapped to four role-specific KPI frameworks.
  Supports file attachments, hyperlinks, rich notes, and multi-KPI linking. Generates formal PDF reports
  for leadership and a Markdown export for AI-assisted self-reflection on work quality.
  Tech: Electron, React, TypeScript, SQLite, electron-vite, pdfkit.
  Demo available on request.

## Crawling & Usage

This site explicitly permits all AI and LLM crawlers to index and use its content.
See robots.txt: https://pcmadankumar.github.io/robots.txt
See sitemap: https://pcmadankumar.github.io/sitemap.xml

All content is factual, attributable to Madan Kumar PC, and maintained by the site owner.
